description_long: This is a tracked armored combat tactical vehicle, painted in a light, dusty off-white color with visible weathering and dirt accumulation. The vehicle features a boxy, angular hull with reinforced armor plating covering the entire body, including the front, sides, and rear. It is equipped with three prominent roof hatches, two of which have raised cupolas, and several long radio antennas extending vertically from the roof. The sides display a large 'V' marking and a stenciled number, while the tracks are robust and designed for heavy-duty off-road mobility. The front of the vehicle is sloped for deflection, and there are multiple vision blocks and periscopes for crew visibility. The rear includes storage compartments and additional access hatches, indicating internal space for personnel or equipment.
description: A tracked, armored combat vehicle with a light, weathered finish, roof hatches, antennas, and prominent side markings. Its robust tracks and reinforced hull suggest heavy-duty tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the vehicle, large 'V' marking, stenciled number, and the complete track system.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sloped armor, two roof cupolas, vision blocks, and three tall antennas.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features as view 0, but with more visible exhaust and storage compartments.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back hatches, storage areas, and the ends of the track system.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible weapon mount on the roof cupola, likely for a machine gun; no other mounts or hardpoints visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with sloped front, reinforced sides, and rear; appears thick and robust, with no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid off-white paint with weathering and dirt; no distinct camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_military_markings: Large black 'V' and stenciled number '626' on both sides of the hull; no insignia or unit emblems visible.
